title: crateva obovata
intro: Crateva obovata, also known as the Indian water vine or water caltrop, is a plant species belonging to the family Capparaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to treat various health issues such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems. Crateva obovata is also known to have various health benefits, including reducing stress, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect the body from free radicals. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or ointments, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
